title: centaurea × olweri
intro: Centaurea × olweri, also known as Olwen's knapweed or Centaurea olweri, is a hybrid plant species within the Asteraceae family, resulting from the cross between Centaurea scabiosa and Centaurea cyanus. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Centaurea × olweri is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
